mapper.insert: INSERT INTO job (company_id, posted_by, title, description, location, employment_type, experience_level, salary_min, salary_max, status, deadline) VALUES (#{companyId}, #{postedBy}, #{title}, #{description}, #{location}, #{employmentType}, #{experienceLevel}, #{salaryMin}, #{salaryMax}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'OPEN'), #{deadline})
mapper.update: UPDATE job SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND posted_by = #{postedBy}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM job WHERE id = #{id} AND posted_by = #{postedBy}
mapper.select: SELECT j.* FROM job j INNER JOIN saved_job sj ON j.id = sj.job_id WHERE sj.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY sj.saved_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO saved_job (user_id, job_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{jobId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM saved_job WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND job_id = #{jobId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM saved_job WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND job_id = #{jobId}
